title: Army paratroopers ordered to Middle East as U.S. weighs next move in Iran conflict
summary_full: The orders follow weeks of speculation about whether the 82nd Airborne Division would join the war, after its headquarters unit abruptly pulled out of a training exercise this month.
summary_public: The orders follow weeks of speculation about whether the 82nd Airborne Division would join the war, after its headquarters unit abruptly pulled out of a training exercise this month.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Army paratroopers ordered to Middle East as U.S. weighs next move in Iran conflict
